author: jameshe5018
content: I was thinking we should just change the global default, we had the ability for each validator to choose their own gas limit before but it probably doesn't make sense and could just create problems

author: nflaig
content: I don't see why that is a problem? but either way, a client can implement it that way an disallow per pubkey configs if it's causing issues, not sure it warrants a spec change

author: jameshe5018
content: i mean it's probably not good for the network to have part of your validators with really low gas limits and other half really high
